ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: I joined the Aprova Fácil team as a front-end developer, where I had the opportunity to help shape and deliver two impactful mobile apps from the ground up. My focus was on building user-friendly, robust solutions that made a real difference for our clients.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenge
Details: At Aprova Fácil, I was hands-on in building and evolving two mobile apps that made life easier for both clients and end users. My day-to-day was all about React Native—designing and shipping features that worked beautifully on both Android and iOS.

I worked closely with the team to turn real user feedback into practical features, always aiming for a smooth, intuitive experience. I loved the challenge of making the apps not just functional, but genuinely enjoyable to use.

State management was handled with Redux Toolkit, which let us keep everything fast and reliable, even as the apps grew more complex. I also integrated our apps with robust back-end APIs to keep data fresh and responsive.
One of my favorite parts was building out WhatsApp integration—making it easy for users to share and interact directly from the app, which really boosted engagement.

I put a lot of care into writing clean, well-documented code, so the team could move fast and keep improving the product. I also supported a NodeJS chatbot project, helping users get real estate suggestions and documents via WhatsApp, powered by the Twilio API.
